name: node-postcss
title: node-postcss
summary: Tool for transforming styles with JS plugins
description:
Tool for transforming styles with JS plugins
These plugins can lint your CSS, support variables and mixins, transpile
future CSS syntax, inline images, and more.
.
PostCSS is used by industry leaders including Wikipedia, Twitter, Alibaba,
and JetBrains. The [Autoprefixer] PostCSS plugin is one of the most popular
CSS processors.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use nanoid because Tool for transforming styles with JS plugins.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use nanoid as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nanoid [options] [args]` as documented upstream for nanoid.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair nanoid with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `nanoid --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
